channel.title: Embedded on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Embedded on Arrans github.io

item.title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
item.description: Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.

item.title: shellhub-io/shellhub
item.description: 💻 Get seamless remote access to any Linux device. Centralized SSH for the edge and cloud computing

item.title: lvgl/lvgl
item.description: Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

item.title: objectbox/objectbox-go
item.description: Embedded Go Database, the fast alternative to SQLite, gorm, etc.

item.title: objectbox/objectbox-dart
item.description: Flutter database for super-fast Dart object persistence
